mapper.select: SELECT m.login_id, m.password, mt.type_name, m.nickname,m.profile_url,m.status_id,m.member_type_id FROM members m JOIN member_type mt ON m.member_type_id = mt.member_type_id WHERE m.login_id = #{loginId} AND m.delete_yn = 'N'
SELECT * FROM members WHERE email = #{email} AND delete_yn='N'

SELECT m.member_id, m.login_id, m.mobile, m.nickname, m.email, m.password, m.profile_url, m.member_type_id, m.status_id, TO_CHAR(m.created_at,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS created_at, mi.gender, TO_CHAR(mi.birth,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS birth, mi.point, mi.trust_score, mi.login_ip, mi.join_ip, mi.ai_summary
FROM members m JOIN member_info mi ON m.member_id = mi.member_id
WHERE m.login_id = #{loginId} AND m.delete_yn='N'
SELECT i.interest_name FROM member_interest mi JOIN interest i ON mi.interest_id = i.interest_id WHERE mi.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY i.interest_id
SELECT interest_id, interest_name FROM interest ORDER BY interest_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO members ( member_id, login_id, email, nickname, password, profile_url, member_type_id, status_id, provider, provider_id ) VALUES ( members_seq.nextval, #{loginId}, #{email}, #{nickname}, #{password}, #{profileUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{memberTypeId}, #{statusId}, #{provider}, #{providerId} )
insert into member_info(member_id,gender,birth,join_ip) values(members_seq.currval,NVL(#{gender, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'N'),#{birth, jdbcType=DATE},NVL(#{joinIp, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '0.0.0.0'))
INSERT INTO member_info ( member_id ) VALUES ( members_seq.currval )
INSERT INTO member_interest ( member_id, interest_id ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{interestId} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE members
nickname = #{nickname}, password = #{password}, mobile = #{mobile}, email = #{email},
profile_url = #{profileUrl},
WHERE member_id=#{memberId}

UPDATE member_info
gender=#{gender},
birth=#{birth},
WHERE member_id=#{memberId}
mapper.select: SELECT member_id, login_id, password, profile_url FROM members WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND delete_yn = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE members SET delete_yn='Y' WHERE login_id=#{loginId}
UPDATE members SET delete_yn='Y', status_id=4 WHERE member_id=#{memberId}
